extraction.one_line_summary: CORT Magnus won Stage 3 TTT by 1.4 seconds over Jumbo-Visma, taking yellow jersey as individual time determined team result under new format rules.
tactical_patterns: Jayco-AlUla dominated intermediate check by 22.7 seconds, revealing superior pacing strategy in early headwind sections before fading.
POGACAR attacked own teammates in final meters exploiting new TTT format where individual GC times taken separately.
Jumbo-Visma brought three riders to line together prioritizing team time over individual GC gains, tactical miscalculation under new rules.

rider_signals.CORT Magnus: positive: Won stage by attacking solo in final meters, demonstrating ability to extract individual time under new TTT format
rider_signals.POGACAR Tadej: positive: Attacked own teammates in finale showing understanding new rules allowed individual GC time theft from team
rider_signals.GOUDOU David: positive: Given armchair ride by KÜNG Stefan suggesting UAE prioritizing his GC position over pure team result
rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: neutral: Jumbo brought three riders to line together gaining only 2-second GC advantage over VINGEGAARD despite stage win
